latin: Duo amici ad nuptias alienas non invitati irruperunt. 'regula prima nuptiarum irrumpendarum,' dixit alter, 'est gaudere. regula secunda: numquam solus eas.'

questions.prompt: What do the two friends do?

translation: Two friends burst uninvited into strangers' weddings. 'The first rule of wedding crashing,' said one, 'is to have fun. The second rule: never go alone.'
